name: Chocolate Chip Pancakes, Use Egg Beaters.
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add the buttermilk.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
4. Blend well into the egg mixture.
5. Add the melted butter; mix thoroughly.
6. Spoon batter onto a lightly greased griddle or skillet.
7. Cook until both sides are browned and the pancakes are done (medium-high heat).
- To make buttermilk: add 1 tablespoon lemon juice to milk.
- These pancakes are excellent made with egg beaters as an egg substitute.
- Sprinkle chocolate chips over the pancake while cooking on the first side.
- Note: These pancakes work best when cooked in a snack sandwich maker.
